InputStreamReader.java

00030 terms of your choice, provided that you also meet, for each linked
00031 independent module, the terms and conditions of the license of that
00032 module.  An independent module is a module which is not derived from
00033 or based on this library.  If you modify this library, you may extend

00035 obligated to do so.  If you do not wish to do so, delete this
00036 exception statement from your version. */
00037 
00038 
00039 package java.io;
00040 
00076 public class InputStreamReader extends Reader
00077 {
00081     private InputStream in;
00082 
00089     public InputStreamReader(InputStream in)
00090     {
00091         this.in = in;
00092     }
00093 
00106     public InputStreamReader(InputStream in, String encoding)
00107         throws UnsupportedEncodingException
00108     {
00109         if (!encoding.equals("ISO8859_1")
00110             && !encoding.equals("US_ASCII")
00111             && !encoding.equals("UTF-8"))
00112         {
00113             throw new UnsupportedEncodingException();
00114         }
00115 
00116         this.in = in;
00117     }
00118 
00130     public int read() throws IOException
00131     {
00132         char[] buf = new char[1];
00133         int count = read(buf, 0, 1);
00134 
00135         return count > 0 ? buf[0] : -1;
00136     }
00137 
00151     public int read(char[] buf, int offset, int length) throws IOException
00152     {
00153         if (in == null)
00154             throw new IOException("Reader has been closed");
00155 
00156         byte[] bytes = new byte[length];
00157         int read = in.read(bytes);
00158 
00159         for (int i = 0; i < read; i++)
00160             buf[offset+i] = (char)(bytes[i]&0xFF);
00161 
00162         return read;
00163     }
00164 
00177      public long skip(long count) throws IOException
00178      {
00179          if (in == null)
00180              throw new IOException();
00181 
00182          if (count < 0)
00183              throw new IllegalArgumentException();
00184 
00185          return super.skip(count);
00186      }
00187 
00199     public boolean ready() throws IOException
00200     {
00201         if (in == null)
00202             throw new IOException();
00203 
00204         return in.available() != 0;
00205     }
00206 
00213     public void mark(int readLimit) throws IOException
00214     {
00215         checkMarkReset();
00216         in.mark(readLimit);
00217     }
00218 
00223     public void reset() throws IOException
00224     {
00225         checkMarkReset();
00226         in.reset();
00227     }
00228 
00235     public void close() throws IOException
00236     {
00237         synchronized (lock)
00238         {
00239             if (in != null)
00240                 in.close();
00241 
00242             in = null;
00243         }
00244     }
00245 
00246     private void checkMarkReset() throws IOException
00247     {
00248         if (in == null)
00249             throw new IOException();
00250 
00251         if (in.markSupported() == false)
00252             throw new IOException();
00253     }
00254 }
